settings.bannerbelow_heading:
When you send a Velvey, you're not only sending a gift, you're sending an experience 
with some extraordinary twists. Whoever gets your Velvey is going to love it!
settings.bannerbelow_heading_text1: Ready to learn more? Keep scrolling.
settings.bannerbelow_heading_text3: Whichever you choose, your Velvey always includes a card and personal message. You’ll be sure to brighten the day of whoever receives it!
settings.textimage1_step1: Everyday Picks Includes iconic black, sapphire blue, beautiful red and elegant maroon pouches and your choice of a yummy treat.
settings.textimage2_step1: FeaturedThemed Velveys with a limited-edition treat for both special and “uniquely you” occasions.
settings.text_step2: Sending a Velvey alone is memorable, but why not spice it up a little with a digital gift card? This optional step lets you pick from a variety of merchants and choose a dollar amount. Your recipient will then receive instructions on how to redeem.
settings.text_step3: Finally, we offer three fun digital ways to personalize your message. You can write a note, record an audio message, or make a video. What better way to personalize your Velvey than with  a piece of yourself?
settings.text_step4: Your Velvey recipient gets a generous helping of goodness in a chic reusable jar, plus a branded envelope containing a card that provides detailed instructions about retrieving their message (and digital gift card if you added one!).
settings.text_step5: You want to know your Velvey arrived, so we make confirmation easy! When your recipient visits message.velvey.com to enter their retrieval code, we offer them the option to let you know they got it. If they check the box to notify you, you'll receive a confirmation text and/or email.
settings.text_step6:
After your recipient reads, listens to, or watches your message, they can send you a "thank you" back the same way: in a written, audio, or video message. After they finish and hit "Send," you'll receive either a text or an email (or both!) with a unique link and code to
access it. We're pretty sure it's what'll hit you right in the heartstrings.
